subcodes.first_line: O ancient servant of the Blessed Beauty! Two letters were received on the same day, and I read them. From the realm of sanctity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده قدیم جمال مبارک دو مکتوب در یوم واحد واصل خواندم و از ملکوت تقدیس
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @non-participation in politics, @review of publications, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
